summary: Attempted comprehensive dashboard testing to verify fix for 0 transaction/volume values. Code review confirms proper implementation of dual API calls (/dashboard + /wallet/getUserAnalytics) but authentication barriers prevented full UI verification.

ui_bugs.issue: Complex multi-step authentication flow (email/SMS/password verification) prevents automated testing access to dashboard
ui_bugs.selector: Login form with multiple verification methods

passed_tests: DashboardSaga.ts code review: Properly implemented dual API calls to /dashboard and /wallet/getUserAnalytics
Logic correctly supplements dashboard data with analytics when dashboard returns 0 values
Conditional logic properly checks for zero values and replaces with analytics data
Total volume calculation: Sum of revenue_performance amounts with proper currency formatting
Code structure maintains backward compatibility while fixing zero value issues
action_item_for_main_agent: Login authentication flow is blocking dashboard UI testing. Recommended actions: 1) Simplify authentication for testing environment, 2) Provide direct dashboard access method, 3) Test dashboard manually to verify 640 transactions and ~$14,790 volume are displayed correctly, 4) Verify referral code shows DYNO2026NOMC92496B9
success_percentage: backend: 90% - Code implementation verified correct, frontend: 20% - Unable to access dashboard due to auth barriers
